[@microsoft/fast-element/html.js](../fast-element/index.html) &gt; [HTMLView](../fast-element.htmlview/index.html) &gt; [isPrerendered](../fast-element.htmlview.isprerendered/index.html)

## HTMLView.isPrerendered property

A promise that resolves with `true` after prerendered content has been hydrated, or `false` when the view is client-side rendered. Resolves once the first bind completes.

**Signature:**

```typescript
isPrerendered: Promise<boolean>;
```
